query:
SELECT ap.id, ap.alunoId, ap.macroInicio, ap.macroTermino, ap.status, t.name as trilha
FROM assessment_pdi ap
JOIN trilhas t ON ap.trilhaId = t.id
WHERE t.name LIKE '%Vis%'
LIMIT 5;
command:
